error_signature: Code node shows both JavaScript and Python editors
title: Code node displays incorrect editors for Python
symptom: When using the Code node with Python specified, both JavaScript and Python editors are shown instead of just the Python editor.
applies_when: Using Code node with Python language
not_this_if: Using JavaScript language in the Code node
root_cause: The Code node's versioning system may not properly handle the language setting when the typeVersion is set to an outdated version. This leads to the display of both editors instead of the intended single editor.
fix_steps: Check the Code node to ensure only the Python editor is displayed
agent_instruction: Set the `typeVersion` of the Code node to `2` to resolve the editor display issue.
